output:
What is GenAI and how will it impact your future 
as a student and professional 
GenAI is a cutting edge technology 
that uses artificial intelligence to generate 
human like text and images 
with applications in education and industry 
including machine learning and data science 
natural language processing and computer vision 
it can help with research and writing 
and even create customized learning plans 
for students in various fields 
such as business and economics 
computer science and engineering 
healthcare and biotechnology 
and social sciences and humanities 
to learn more about GenAI 
and how it can benefit you 
visit our website and follow us 
on social media using hashtags
